steps.title: Spot the contextual signal
steps.content: The sentence after the blank lists three different perspectives: the mother's, the father's, and the daughter's. Each section is from a different person — separate, individual viewpoints.

steps.title: Match to a synonym for "uncovered/identified"
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean "uncovered" or "identified" — genetic research found and disclosed maize's ancestor. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — revealed: uncovered or disclosed — genetic research discovered and showed the ancestor; fits perfectly. ✓
  • Choice B — expanded: made larger or broader — implies the research grew something, not that it identified an ancestor. ✗
  • Choice C — encouraged: gave support or confidence to — implies motivating teosinte, which makes no sense. ✗
  • Choice D — petitioned: made a formal request — research can't formally request an ancestor; grammatically and logically wrong. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
